subject: Switch — Pokemon Trainer Item card depicting a Poke Ball and a switching device on a rainbow gradient background
description: The card art depicts two items against a vivid rainbow-gradient background: a standard Poke Ball (red-and-white sphere with a central button) on the left, and a small boxy electronic device or remote control unit on the right, connected or associated with the switching mechanism. The rainbow background radiates from the center outward in arcing bands of color. The composition is clean and graphic, object-focused with no figures or setting — pure item illustration in the style typical of Pokemon Trainer cards.
foreground: Poke Ball (red-and-white sphere) and small electronic switching device
background: rainbow gradient radiating bands of color
emotion: neutral — object card, no emotional figure
